text: Toscafund's PUSU deadline extended to 6 August - financing being finalised
ECP and KKR's due diligence completed, ECP and KKR's PUSU deadline extended to 15 July 2026.
Epiris' PUSU deadline extended to 5 August
Offer document published. Unconditional date will be 29 July 2026
The SEGRO Board reiterates its stance that Prologis' proposal is opportunistic, one-sided and inadequate
Board states that Glenstone's revised 71.4p offer is at a "negligible premium" and recommends shareholders take no action
